channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Tiger Woods teams up with Augusta National to build par-3 course at the Patch
item.description: Tiger Woods and Augusta National announced they have teamed up to build a par-3 course at the facility known as the Patch in Augusta, Georgia.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tyler Warren wins Penn State honor for on field, academic success
item.description: (WHTM) - Penn State tight end Tyler Warren was among the student athletes recognized with the Ernest B. McCoy Memorial Award for his success both on and off the field.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, PHL 17

item.title: Two courts: NCAA's present (Gators!) and future play out 1700 miles apart on the same day
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — The final buzzer in San Antonio closed a drama that ended with confetti and Gator chomps — a thrill-a-minute NCAA title for the Florida Gators that reminded us all of what's so good about the games these college athletes play.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: How to watch the US women’s national soccer team vs. Brazil in San Jose
item.description: The U.S. women's national soccer team plays its second friendly match in three days against Brazil at PayPal Park in San Jose on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Pueng Vongs, The Mercury News

item.title: Using therapist, San Jose Sharks winger works on his mental game
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks forward Nikolai Kovalenko earned his first point in nearly a month Monday against the Calgary Flames
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Houston on the wrong side of gritty and ugly finish against Florida in national title game
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — This ending was gritty and ugly, just the way Houston usually likes games. Except it was Florida forcing bad shots and turnovers against the Cougars to finish off the national championship game Monday night.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Florida wins its third national title, denies Houston its first, rallying for 65-63 win
item.description: Former Saint Mary's guard Todd Golden coaches Gators to a thrilling victory in a game that went down to the buzzer.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Red Sox's Jarren Duran opens up about mental health, attempted suicide in Netflix documentary
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — EDITOR’S NOTE — This story includes discussion of suicide. If you or someone you know needs help, the national suicide and crisis lifeline in the U.S. is available by calling or texting 988. There is also an online chat at 988lifeline.org.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Billie Jean King immortalized in bronze with star on Hollywood Walk of Fame
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Billie Jean King became the first woman to receive a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame in the new sports entertainment category on Monday and she was joined by friends Magic Johnson and Oscar-winning actor Jamie Lee Curtis.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pegula Ice Arena hosting Frozen Four watch party
item.description: UNIVERSITY PARK (Nittany Nation) -- Penn State athletics announced a Frozen Four watch party Thursday night at the Pegula Ice arena. Penn State hockey plays Boston University Thursday at 8:30 p.m. in the Nittany Lions' first Frozen Four appearance.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Clay, PHL 17

item.title: MLB batting average drops again to .239, near record low in 1968's Year of the Pitcher
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Offense is down again at the start of the big league season, with hits even harder to come by. The big league batting average was .239 through the first full week of play, down from .240 through the first full week of 2024.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vikings wide receiver Justin Jefferson hosts Youth Football Camp
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI/KSWB) - The NFL offseason is a time for players to train and gear up for the upcoming year, and for the best wide receiver in the league, that training program this offseason consists of being chased around by 300+ kids in San Diego for a day.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: The 2024 World Series Champions, the Los Angeles Dodgers, were honored by President Donald Trump at the White House on Monday before opening a series with the Washington Nationals.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, Fox 5

item.title: Practice is suspended at the Masters because of rain and a threat of severe storms
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Practice at the Masters was suspended late Monday morning and spectators were pulled off the golf course because of worsening rain and the threat of thunderstorms.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Roberto Clemente's son sheds light on Pirates meeting after team draws fury for removing tribute
item.description: Roberto Clemente Jr. spoke to Fox News Digital about his conversation with the Pittsburgh Pirates following the team's decision to remove a tribute to his father.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Alex Ovechkin breaking Wayne Gretzky's record brings joy to hockey and beyond sports
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Ovechkin could not contain his happiness moments after scoring his 895th goal to break Wayne Gretzky's NHL record. After firing the puck into the net, Ovechkin turned and did a belly-flop slide down the ice like he had just won a pee-wee hockey game.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jaquan Brisker's bond with Bears' DC Dennis Allen predates his NFL career
item.description: Jaquan Brisker was originally drafted by the Saints, but instead joined the Bears, where he will be reunited with his former defensive coordinator, Dennis Allen, who is now the Bears' defensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — During the final sweet moments of UConn’s 12th national title, Geno Auriemma and Paige Bueckers embraced after the star guard departed her final game with the Huskies. It was the moment they wanted all along. “They’ve all been gratifying, don’t get me wrong," Auriemma said.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Alex Ovechkin breaks Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record by scoring his 895th
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Ovechkin fired just about the perfect shot from the place on the ice that has defined his remarkable career. When the puck hit the net, it made him the top goal scorer in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Putin congratulates Alex Ovechkin after breaking NHL record
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin congratulated Washington Capitals star Alex Ovechkin for breaking Wayne Gretzky's record for most career goals.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL personality Annie Agar suffers black eye, concussion after scary fall
item.description: NFL personality Annie Agar revealed she suffered a black eye and a concussion after passing out in her bathroom last week. Agar said it was "not fun.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Keyonte George scores career-high 35 in Jazz loss
item.description: ATLANTA (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George set a new career high with 35 points, but it wasn't enough to stop the Utah Jazz' nine-game losing streak in a 147-135 loss to the Atlanta Hawks Sunday. The Jazz have lost 19 of 20 overall. Utah has given up at least 140 points in three straight games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Monarchs suffer first loss of the season in 2-1 battle with Ventura County
item.description: Real Monarchs battled back from a two-goal deficit, pushed late, and nearly snatched a draw from the jaws of defeat for a second straight match - but ultimately fell 2-1.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: Coby White scores 37, Josh Giddey adds 23 as Bulls beat Hornets 131-117 for 3rd straight win
item.description: Coby White scored 37 points, shooting 6 of 8 from 3-point range, Josh Giddey added 23 points, 10 rebounds and eight assists and the Chicago Bulls rolled past the Charlotte Hornets 131-117 on Sunday for their third straight win.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Torkelson's 2-run double in the ninth inning gives Tigers 4-3 win over White Sox
item.description: Spencer Torkelson smacked a two-run double to cap Detroit's three-run rally in the ninth inning and give the Tigers a 4-3 win over the Chicago White Sox on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Clayton leads Florida to NCAA title game, scoring 34 points in 79-73 victory over SEC rival Auburn
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Walter Clayton Jr. is having an NCAA Tournament for the ages. Florida now just needs him to deliver one more time.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Carson Kelly homers as the Cubs beat the Padres 7-1 for their 5th straight win
item.description: Carson Kelly homered and drove in four runs, and the Chicago Cubs beat the San Diego Padres 7-1 on Saturday for their fifth consecutive win.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: The Final Four again has multiple 5th-year starters. This time, it's a farewell to an uncommon era
item.description: “Credit to the NCAA for giving us a year back because that COVID year, that wasn’t real, honestly. Nah, it wasn’t fun at all.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Strong, Fudd help UConn blow out UCLA 85-51 in Final Four as Bueckers moves 1 win from elusive title
item.description: Sarah Strong and Azzi Fudd didn’t even need much help from superstar Paige Bueckers to propel UConn into the national title game, leading the Huskies to a remarkably easy 85-51 victory over UCLA on Friday night in the Final Four of the women’s NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Fox 5

item.title: Capitals beat Blackhawks 5-3, Ovechkin scores two goals to tie Gretzky
item.description: Alex Ovechkin tied Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record by scoring the 893rd and 894th of his career, the second being the game winner, as the Washington Capitals rallied to beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-3 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Imanaga and Happ lead the Cubs past the Padres 3-1 in Wrigley Field opener
item.description: Shota Imanaga pitched one-run ball into the eighth inning in Chicago's home opener at Wrigley Field, and the Cubs handed San Diego its first loss with a 3-1 victory over the Padres on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Chris Collins agrees to multi-year extension with Northwestern
item.description: Northwestern University men's basketball coach Chris Collins has agreed to a multi-year contract extension, making him one of the top coaches in the Big Ten in terms of salary and compensation.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: BYU guard Dallin Hall enters transfer portal
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU point guard announced on Wednesday that he is entering the transfer portal after three seasons with the Cougars.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: How Mesa Juniors Volleyball Club brought home Gold in Las Vegas
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Once high school volleyball season ends, several local high school athletes from all across the Western Slope come together to compete at the club level for the Mesa Juniors Volleyball Club.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Jackson Merrill, Padres agree to $135 million, 9-year contract
item.description: All-Star outfielder Jackson Merrill started paying immediate dividends on the $135 million, nine-year contract he and the San Diego Padres agreed to on Wednesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: GJ Tigers Girls Soccer pours it on Central 10-0
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — There was no moment to take a breath at Unity Field Tuesday night. Seemingly every few seconds yielded a breakaway chance for the Grand Junction Tigers' aggressive attack. And many of those chances were cashed in by the Tigers. Ten of them.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5
